title: More C418
description: More music from the original beloved Minecraft composer
body:
### This resource pack replaces all music not composed by C418 in the game with music from his discography

All tracks by C418, except where listed

Each new song will have links to their respective Bandcamp page to support the artist c:

_(5/30/26)_ **Starting with version 2.0, all music toasts will display all the newly replaced song titles**

All songs have be perceptively normalized to -20 LUFS to blend them in better with the other, quieter music in the game 

### Tracklist

- #### Overworld / Survival / Menu
   - [**NEW**] Amos Roddy - Broken Clocks / [Camomille Part 2](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/camomille-part-2)
   - [**NEW**] Amos Roddy - Below and Above / [hover](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/hover)
   - [**NEW**] Lena Raine - Deeper / [Vinyl Transfer](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/vinyl-transfer)
   - [**NEW**] Lena Raine - Eld Unknown / [Olfactory Journey](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/olfactory-journey)
   - [**NEW**] Lena Raine - Endless / [BD08](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/bd08)
   - [**NEW**] Aaron Cherof - Featherfall / [Another weird ambient tune](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/another-weird-ambient-tune)
   - [**NEW**] Aaron Cherof - Firefiles / [Twilight Breeze](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/twilight-breeze)
   - [**NEW**] Kumi Tanioka - komorebi / [klack](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/klack-2)
   - [**NEW**] Aaron Cherof - Lilypad / [ascend](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/ascend)
   - [**NEW**] Aaron Cherof - O's Piano / [einfallslos](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/einfallslos)
   - [**NEW**] Kumi Tanioka - pokopoko / [anthem](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/anthem)
   - [**NEW**] Aaron Cherof - Puzzlebox / [Patience](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/patience)
   - [**NEW**] Aaron Cherof - Watcher / [click forever](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/click-forever)
   - [**NEW**] Kumi Tanioka - yakusoku / [buildup errors](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/buildup-errors)
   - Lena Raine - Aerie / [house_loneliness](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/house-loneliness)
   - Lena Raine - Ancestry / [Krank](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/krank)
   - Aaron Cherof - A Familiar Room / [Subtle Cupcake Rhythms](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/subtle-cupcake-rhythms)
   - Kumi Tanioka - An Ordinary Day / [Total Drag](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/total-drag)
   - Aaron Cherof - Bromeliad / [Sod](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/sod)
   - Kumi Tanioka - Comforting Memories / [Independent Accident](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/independent-accident)
   - Aaron Cherof  - Cresent Dunes / [Hotel Music](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/hotel-music)
   - Aaron Cherof - Echo in the Wind / [Love](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/love)
   - Lena Raine - Firebugs / [cr1_meadow](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/cr1-meadow)
   - Kumi Tanioka - Floating Dream / [Excursions](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/excursions)
   - Lena Raine - Infinite Amethyst / [Danny Makes Chiptune](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/danny-makes-chiptune)
   - Lena Raine - Labyrinthine / [Match Cut](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/match-cut)
   - Lena Raine - Left to Bloom / [The Weirdest Year of Your Life](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/the-weirdest-year-of-your-life)
   - Lena Raine - One More Day / [Peanuts](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/peanuts)
   - Lena Raine - Stand Tall / [Texture Prayers](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/texture-prayers)
   - Lena Raine - Wending / [The First Million](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/the-first-million)

- #### Nether
   - Lena Raine - Chrysopoeia / [Sleepless](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/sleepless)
   - Lena Raine - Rubedo / [Ritalin](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/ritalin)
   - Lena Raine - So Below / [Some Really Obscure Ambient Tune](https://c418.bandcamp.com/track/some-really-obscure-ambient-tune)

Note: This resource pack's files have been protected to meet [C418's requirements](https://c418.org/2017/01/26/what-am-i-allowed-to-do-with-daniels-music/) to have them in the game. Do not tamper or attempt to extract them.
